package_salary.ppo_ctc: Stipend during 4 -6 months of Internship : 25 K per month Salary after Internship (If PPO given) : CTC 7 LPA Note : Students who excel in performance during internship will be absorbed into full time employment with a compensation of 7 LPA (Statutory deductions like P/f and Tax)

selection_process_steps: : Technical interviews followed by HR interviews
